reviews.comment:
Conocida acá como la YPF del ACA.
Muy buena atención por parte del personal de playa y del shop.
Comodas instalaciones para tomar un café o comer alguna minuta.

(Translated by Google)
Known here as the YPF at the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
Excellent service from the gas station attendants and the shop staff.
Comfortable facilities for enjoying a coffee or a quick bite.
